sections.label: Work with the people who are driving innovation forward
sections.text: Work with the people who are driving innovation forward A place to grow Join Canada’s most connected innovation ecosystem. Founders, funders, researchers, policy-makers, corporates and advisors come together at the MaRS Centre and Waterfront hub to collaborate, spark new ideas and help startups grow. Find out more about our flexible office, lab and event spaces. The right connections Whether you’re raising capital, looking to shape your narrative, or testing new markets, MaRS opens doors to vetted investors, customers and partners. Explore our targeted programming for startups. Expert guidance Every founder needs a sounding board. Learn from seasoned advisors and industry experts who’ve built and scaled real companies. MaRS provides tailored support at every stage of growth. Meet our advisors.

sections.className: statsFeature sectorSection sectionWrapper show_brand_icons mt-0 mb-0
sections.label: Scaling innovation for global impact
sections.text: HOW WE WORK Scaling innovation for global impact Canada’s most ambitious founders turn to MaRS for support to help hit key milestones from pre-seed funding to international expansion. 1,200+ Ventures supported by MaRS across sectors $ 11B+ Raised by MaRS-supported companies between 2010 and 2024 125+ Companies and organizations are based in the MaRS Centre and MaRS Waterfront Discover Canada’s most promising startups in real time. MaRS Connect is an exclusive platform that gives founders, investors and innovation buyers direct access to vetted ventures, market information and new opportunities.

sections.label: Increasing the odds of success for Canadian startups
sections.text: STARTUPS Increasing the odds of success for Canadian startups MaRS supports hundreds of companies at every stage of growth to achieve global impact and scale. Startup Services Sprout Family Strategic public relations support helped Sprout Family grow its business. StellarAlgo StellarAlgo refined its communications game plan and doubled its customer base. Effenco Effenco found a pathway to market and landed a contract with the City of Toronto. RetiSpec RetiSpec raised awareness about its game-changing medical device. Ayrton Energy Ayrton Energy refined its pitch deck and closed its seed round.

sections.label: Driving change
sections.text: Driving change At MaRS, we bring Canada’s most innovative organizations and leaders together to commercialize science and technology, bolstering productivity and building the country’s industrial base. Apply to MaRS Work with Us Life sciences We support health and life sciences companies bringing breakthrough therapies, diagnostics and digital care solutions to market. Learn More Cleantech We help cleantech startups scale solutions in food, energy, transportation, construction and manufacturing, accelerating the shift to a more sustainable future. Learn More Emerging technologies We provide founders building the next wave of transformative tech with the tools they need to develop solutions in AI, quantum, robotics, advanced manufacturing and other emerging sectors. Learn More

sections.label: Bringing prosthetics to people in need
sections.text: Bringing prosthetics to people in need Almost 40 million people require prosthetics or orthotics, but only 10 to 15 per cent can access them. The Victoria Hand Project has developed a sustainable way of creating customized upper limb replacements anywhere in the world. These five cleantech startups are literally breaking new ground The startups in the inaugural cohort of the MaRS First-of-a-Kind Lab are gearing up for commercial-scale deployment of their climate solutions. Pulse Check: Overcoming barriers facing Canadian health tech ventures At #MaRSImpactHealth, we spoke with panelists and attendees about the biggest barriers facing Canadian health ventures.

sections.label: Support innovation that matters
sections.text: Support innovation that matters At MaRS, we work with visionary partners — investors, philanthropists, corporates and governments — to accelerate breakthroughs with tangible results. If you’re looking to fund the next generation of startups and strengthen Canada’s innovation economy, we’ll help you connect with the right opportunities. Philanthropy Make innovation your legacy. Support science, technology and talent that will shape the future. Your donation helps high-potential founders turn bold ideas into lasting impact. Support innovation Investors Fuel the next generation of transformation startups. In addition to the work of MaRS IAF, MaRS connects forward-thinking investors with high-potential companies driving impact. Partner with MaRS Partners Collaborate on the future. We work with corporate leaders, policy-makers, philanthropists and civic innovators to help startups commercialize solutions through curated partnerships. Learn More

sections.label: Driving change
sections.text: Driving change At MaRS, we bring Canada’s most innovative organizations and leaders together to commercialize science and technology, bolstering productivity and building the country’s industrial base. Apply to MaRS Work with Us Life sciences We support health and life sciences companies bringing breakthrough therapies, diagnostics and digital care solutions to market. Learn More Cleantech We help cleantech startups scale solutions in food, energy, transportation, construction and manufacturing, accelerating the shift to a more sustainable future. Learn More Emerging technologies We provide founders building the next wave of transformative tech with the tools they need to develop solutions in AI, quantum, robotics, advanced manufacturing and other emerging sectors. Learn More
